listitem.para: Describe Polish communication practices as they relate to the practice of using the third person.
What do Poles expect in terms of timeliness?
Describe taboo behaviors for Polish children.
Name and describe at least three diseases common among Poles.
What are some of the foods a Pole might eat?
Describe some prescriptive and restrictive Polish prenatal/postpartum practices.
What might you do to encourage a stoic Pole to accept pain medication?
How is mental illness perceived by Poles?
Identify at least three common folk remedies commonly used by Polish people.
Post-COVID, how have health, social, and economic services changed in Poland?
What measures will the Ministry of Health implement to improve COVID vaccination rates in Poland with Poles and Ukrainians?
Why is Ukraine important to Poland?
What is the current impact on Poland because of the Russian-Ukrainian war?
What will the Ministry of Health leadership and government officials implement to improve culturally competent care in Poland?
